# Digiteekaart.ee

Digiteekaart.ee is an Estonian-language site by Ettevõtluskeskus OÜ for Estonian SME owners who want to understand whether the EIS digitalisation roadmap grant could fit their company.

Primary audience: older or non-technical SME owners who need a clear, practical explanation before starting a grant or digitalisation project.

Main promise: pre-check whether the EIS digitalisation roadmap measure is worth pursuing, what information is needed, and what the roadmap should contain.

Current public EIS references:
- Digitalisation roadmap grant: https://eis.ee/teenused/digitaliseerimise-teekaardi-toetus/
- Digitalisation roadmap advisory and development activities grant: https://eis.ee/teenused/digitaliseerimise-teekaardi-arendustegevused-toetus/

Useful links:
- Homepage: https://digiteekaart.ee/
- Quick check: https://02signal.ai/et/kiirkontroll/?utm_source=digiteekaart.ee&utm_medium=microsite&utm_campaign=digiteekaart
- Contact: info@02signal.ai, +372 5818 0435
